APPROVE
Implementation in parent commit 0bf4c4d adds count(*) streaming aggregation and integration tests covering OPTIONAL MATCH null preservation, EXISTS true/false, DISTINCT, and ORDER BY ASC/DESC with explicit assertions for Sort materialization vs covered IndexLookup. Reviewed evidence commit (6062e4a) only contains attempt manifest/result files, which is appropriate.
